Export.zv: Cache for UNIX (Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86-64) 2014.1.3 (Build 775)
Export.Routine: DVPLOC2 ;DAL/BNT - Digital Veterans Platform Organization SEARCH;5/19/2017 ;;1.0;DIGITAL VETERANS PLATFORM;****; ; ;Per VA Directive 6402, this routine should not be modified. ; ; External References DBIA# ; ------------------- ----- ; DIC 10090 ; SRCHLOC(SOURCE,TARGET) ; N QRYRSLT,IX,RSLTARY,PAGING,BUFFER,SMRY,CNT,OUT,DVPLOC,RECMAX S (SMRY,CNT,IX,DVPCNT)=0,RECMAX=100 D GETPARMS^DVPUTL(.SOURCE,.PARAMS),CLNPARAM^DVPUTLS S:$P($G(QUERYPAR("_summary")),U)="true" SMRY=1 ; Search by name I $P($G(QUERYPAR("name")),U)'="" D . D LIST^DIC(44,,,,,"",$$UP^XLFSTR($P($G(QUERYPAR("name")),U)),"","","","OUT") I $D(OUT) D . S IEN="",DVPCNT=0 F S IEN=$O(OUT("DILIST",2,IEN)) Q:IEN="" D . . S DVPCNT=DVPCNT+1,RSLTARY(DVPCNT)=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("location","",OUT("DILIST",2,IEN)) ; Search by address I $P($G(QUERYPAR("address")),U)'="" D . D LIST^DIC(44,,"@;10",,,"","","","","","OUT") . N IX,FLD S DVPCNT=0,IX="" F S IX=$O(OUT("DILIST","ID",IX)) Q:IX="" D . . S FND=0,FLD="" F S FLD=$O(OUT("DILIST","ID",IX,FLD)) Q:FLD="" D Q:FND=1 . . . I $$LOW^XLFSTR(OUT("DILIST","ID",IX,FLD))[$$LOW^XLFSTR($P($G(QUERYPAR("address")),U)) D S FND=1 . . . . S DVPCNT=DVPCNT+1,RSLTARY(DVPCNT)=$$SETUID^DVPXUTL("location","",OUT("DILIST",2,IX)) ; N PAGING S DFN="" D:+DVPCNT>0 . D PAGING^DVPUTLS(DVPCNT,.PAGING) G:$G(PAGING("OO")) QUIT . I DVPCNT>RECMAX,$P($G(QUERYPAR("page")),U)="",$P($G(QUERYPAR("count")),U)="" D . . N NODE S PAGING("REND")=RECMAX,NODE=$NA(@TARGET@("results","warning","OperationOutcome","issue","severity")) . . S @NODE@("severity")="warning" . . S @NODE@("code")="too-costly" . . S @NODE@("details")="" ; Operation Outcome Codes . . S @NODE@("diagnostics")="The query returned too many records. The result will be trimmed to "_RECMAX_" records. Consider using paging." . . S @NODE@("location")="SRCHPAT^DVPFPT1" . F RSLTCNT=PAGING("RSTART"):1:PAGING("REND") Q:RSLTCNT=0 D . . D FHIRLOC^DVPLOC1(RSLTARY(RSLTCNT),.DVPLOC,SMRY) . . M @TARGET@("results","bundle",RSLTCNT)=DVPLOC D MRGPGNG^DVPUTLS ; QUIT ; Q
